name: Bistec Picado Burrito
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F to 425°F.
2. Cut the beef into bite-size pieces and place them in a roasting pan with enough oil to prevent sticking.
3. Add coarsely chopped onions and bell peppers to the pan.
4. Place the pan in the hot oven and bake until well browned, turning occasionally.
5. Add the cans of chiles, tomatillos, jalapeno peppers, cilantro, red chile powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake for another 1 to 2 hours.
7. Serves 12 people.
